## Checklist

- [ ] The change stays within the issue or task scope.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] Accessibility and reduced-motion behavior were considered.
- [ ] Privacy and sensitive skincare data were considered.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or real user photos are included.
- [ ] Durable documentation or decisions were updated when needed.
